# Reusable AI context — aaqueen-ecom

**Package:** `portfolio` | **Architecture:** GetX feature-based (features/ + global/ + controller/)

## What this app is

Discount Queen — Flutter e-commerce app (GetX).

## Key paths

- Entry: `lib/main.dart`
- Routes: `lib/controller/routes.dart` or `lib/global/constant/routers_const.dart`
- Features: `lib/features/` or `lib/view/`
- Shared: `lib/global/`

## WhatsApp / requirements mapping

Match group chat names: aaqueen ecom, portfolio, ARCHITECTURE, Aaqueen Ecom, screens, aaqueen-ecom

## Dependencies (top)

cupertino_icons, get, dio, connectivity_plus, shared_preferences, hive, hive_flutter, cached_network_image, flutter_cache_manager, image_picker, flutter_image_compress, shimmer, device_info_plus, package_info_plus, permission_handler, url_launcher, share_plus, path_provider, intl, logger
